# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/b_yv5s
# It was generated by CMake: /home/linzejia/app/cmake/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Activations
ACTIVATION:BOOL=ON

//Prefer autovectorizable code to one using C intrinsics
AUTOVECTORIZE:BOOL=OFF

//Basic Maths for NN
BASICMATHSNN:BOOL=ON

//Build tests for CTest driven FVP runs for built applications
BUILD_FVP_TESTS:BOOL=OFF

//LCD configuration base address
CLCD_CONFIG_BASE:STRING=0x4930A000

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-ar

//ASM compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/b_yv5s/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-ld

CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/arm-gnu-toolchain-14.2.rel1-x86_64-arm-none-eabi/bin/arm-none-eabi-strip

//Cortex-M CPU to use
CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR:STRING=cortex-m55

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=CMAKE_TAPI-NOTFOUND

//The CMake toolchain file
CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/scripts/cmake/toolchains/bare-metal-gcc.cmake

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Value Computed by CMake
CMSISDSP_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/b_yv5s/cmsis-dsp

//Value Computed by CMake
CMSISDSP_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
CMSISDSP_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/cmsis-dsp/Source

//Value Computed by CMake
CMSISNN_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/b_yv5s/cmsis_nn

//Value Computed by CMake
CMSISNN_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
CMSISNN_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/cmsis-nn

//Reduce compile time by only using required CMSIS-DSP sources
CMSIS_DSP_MIN_REQ_SRC_LIST:BOOL=ON

//Path to CMSIS DSP sources
CMSIS_DSP_SRC_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/cmsis-dsp

//Path to CMSIS NN sources
CMSIS_NN_SRC_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/cmsis-nn

//Compiler optimization level for CMSIS-NN
CMSIS_OPTIMIZATION_LEVEL:STRING=-O3

//Path to CMSIS directory
CMSIS_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/cmsis-6

//Path to CMSIS sources
CMSIS_SRC_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/cmsis-6

//Concatenation
CONCATENATION:BOOL=ON

//Convolutions
CONVOLUTION:BOOL=ON

//Default accelerator backend
CORE_SOFTWARE_ACCELERATOR:STRING=NPU

//Path to Cortex DFP sources
CORTEX_DFP_SRC_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/cortex-dfp

//Output CPU performance profiling information. Should be used
// only for MPS3 board.
CPU_PROFILE_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Base address for IFMs to be loaded
DYNAMIC_IFM_BASE:STRING=0x92000000

//Size of the space reserved for the IFM
DYNAMIC_IFM_SIZE:STRING=0x01000000

//Region to be used for dynamic load of model into memory
DYNAMIC_MODEL_BASE:STRING=0x90000000

//Size of the space reserved for the model
DYNAMIC_MODEL_SIZE:STRING=0x02000000

//Base address for OFMs to be dumped to
DYNAMIC_OFM_BASE:STRING=0x93000000

//Size of the space reserved for the OFM
DYNAMIC_OFM_SIZE:STRING=0x01000000

//Inference timeout (unit is implementation defined)
ETHOSU_INFERENCE_TIMEOUT:STRING=

//Toggle driver logs on/off (Defaults to ON)
ETHOSU_LOG_ENABLE:BOOL=ON

//Driver log severity level err;warning;info;debug (Defaults to
// 'warning')
ETHOSU_LOG_SEVERITY:STRING=debug

//Target Ethos-U configuration for driver.
ETHOSU_TARGET_NPU_CONFIG:STRING=ethos-u65-512

//Ethos-U NPU base address
ETHOS_U_BASE_ADDR:STRING=0x58102000

//Ethos-U55 Interrupt
ETHOS_U_IRQN:STRING=56

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ETHOS_U_NPU_CACHE_SIZE:UNINITIALIZED=2097152

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ETHOS_U_NPU_CONFIG_ID:UNINITIALIZED=Y512

//Path to Ethos-U NPU core driver sources
ETHOS_U_NPU_DRIVER_SRC_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/core-driver

//If Arm Ethos-U NPU is enabled in the target system.
ETHOS_U_NPU_ENABLED:BOOL=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ETHOS_U_NPU_ID:UNINITIALIZED=U65

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
ETHOS_U_NPU_MEMORY_MODE:UNINITIALIZED=Dedicated_Sram

//Specifies if the Ethos-U timing adapter is enabled
ETHOS_U_NPU_TIMING_ADAPTER_ENABLED:BOOL=ON

//Path to Ethos-U NPU timing adapter sources
ETHOS_U_NPU_TIMING_ADAPTER_SRC_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/core-platform/drivers/timing_adapter

//Ethos-U NPU Privilege enable
ETHOS_U_PRIV_ENABLED:STRING=1

//Ethos-U NPU Security enable
ETHOS_U_SEC_ENABLED:STRING=1

//16-bit field. Max no. of 64-bit words transfered per pulse cycle
// 0=infinite
EXT_BWCAP:STRING=1172

//Controls which histogram bin (0-15) that should be accessed by
// HISTCNT.
EXT_HISTBIN:STRING=0

//32-bit field. Read/write the selected histogram bin.
EXT_HISTCNT:STRING=0

//6-bit field. Max no. of pending reads. 0=infinite
EXT_MAXR:STRING=24

//6-bit field. Max no. of pending reads+writes. 0=infinite
EXT_MAXRW:STRING=0

//6-bit field. Max no. of pending writes. 0=infinite
EXT_MAXW:STRING=12

//Bit 0: 1=enable dynamic clocking to avoid underrun;
//\n                                                Bit 1: 1=enable
// random AR reordering (0=default);
//\n                                                Bit 2: 1=enable
// random R reordering (0=default);
//\n                                                Bit 3: 1=enable
// random B reordering (0=default);
//\n                                                Bit 11-4: Frequency
// scale 0=full speed, 255=(1/256) speed
EXT_MODE:STRING=1

//32-bit event counter
EXT_PERFCNT:STRING=0

//6-bit field selecting an event for event counter 0=default
EXT_PERFCTRL:STRING=0

//No. of cycles addresses blocked (0-65535).
EXT_PULSE_OFF:STRING=1000

//No. of cycles addresses let through (0-65535).
EXT_PULSE_ON:STRING=4000

//12-bit field. Minimum latency (clock cycles) from AVALID to RVALID.
EXT_RLATENCY:STRING=500

//12-bit field. Minimum latency (clock cycles) from WVALID&WLAST
// to BVALID.
EXT_WLATENCY:STRING=250

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/b_yv5s/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for tensorflow-flatbuffers
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_TENSORFLOW-FLATBUFFERS:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for tensorflow-gemlowp
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_TENSORFLOW-GEMLOWP:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for tensorflow-ruy
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_TENSORFLOW-RUY:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for TensorFlow_Lite_Micro_CMake_Wrapper
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_TENSORFLOW_LITE_MICRO_CMAKE_WRAPPER:PATH=

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of tensorflow-flatbuffers
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_TENSORFLOW-FLATBUFFERS:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of tensorflow-gemlowp
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_TENSORFLOW-GEMLOWP:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of tensorflow-ruy
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_TENSORFLOW-RUY:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of TensorFlow_Lite_Micro_CMake_Wrapper
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_TENSORFLOW_LITE_MICRO_CMAKE_WRAPPER:BOOL=OFF

//Fully Connected
FULLYCONNECTED:BOOL=ON

//Indicates if Virtual Streaming Interface is enabled
FVP_VSI_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Loop static data infinitely
HAL_AUDIO_LOOP:BOOL=OFF

//Loop static data infinitely
HAL_CAMERA_LOOP:BOOL=OFF

//Helium experimental acceleration
HELIUMEXPERIMENTAL:BOOL=OFF

//Build for host
HOST:BOOL=OFF

//Enable interactive mode for use cases. Default - OFF
INTERACTIVE_MODE:BOOL=OFF

//Lax vector conversions
LAXVECTORCONVERSIONS:BOOL=ON

//Enables display of title string on LCD
LCD_TITLE_EN:BOOL=ON

//Title string
LCD_TITLE_STRING:STRING=Arm ML Embedded Evaluation Kit

//Linker script path
LINKER_SCRIPT_PATH:STRING=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/scripts/cmake/platforms/mps3/sse-300/mps3-sse-300-release.gnu.ld

//Log level for the application
LOG_LEVEL:STRING=LOG_LEVEL_INFO

//Loop unrolling
LOOPUNROLL:BOOL=ON

//LSTM
LSTM:BOOL=ON

//Matrix Checks
MATRIXCHECK:BOOL=OFF

//Float16 MVE intrinsics supported
MVEFLOAT16:BOOL=OFF

//Neon acceleration
NEON:BOOL=OFF

//Neon experimental acceleration
NEONEXPERIMENTAL:BOOL=OFF

//NN Support
NNSUPPORT:BOOL=ON

//Pad
PAD:BOOL=ON

//Path to a file.
PLATFORM_BUILD_CONFIG:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/scripts/cmake/platforms/mps3

//Pooling
POOLING:BOOL=ON

//Reshape
RESHAPE:BOOL=ON

//Path to use case models that have been compiled with Vela.
RESOURCES_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/resources_downloaded

//Rounding
ROUNDING:BOOL=OFF

//Enable semihosting instead of UART retarget
SEMIHOSTING_ENABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Softmax
SOFTMAX:BOOL=ON

//16-bit field. Max no. of 64-bit words transfered per pulse cycle
// 0=infinite
SRAM_BWCAP:STRING=4000

//Controls which histogram bin (0-15) that should be accessed by
// HISTCNT.
SRAM_HISTBIN:STRING=0

//32-bit field. Read/write the selected histogram bin.
SRAM_HISTCNT:STRING=0

//6-bit field. Max no. of pending reads. 0=infinite
SRAM_MAXR:STRING=16

//6-bit field. Max no. of pending reads+writes. 0=infinite
SRAM_MAXRW:STRING=0

//6-bit field. Max no. of pending writes. 0=infinite
SRAM_MAXW:STRING=16

//Bit 0: 1=enable dynamic clocking to avoid underrun;
//\n                                             Bit 1: 1=enable
// random AR reordering (0=default);
//\n                                             Bit 2: 1=enable
// random R reordering (0=default);
//\n                                             Bit 3: 1=enable
// random B reordering (0=default);
//\n                                             Bit 11-4: Frequency
// scale 0=full speed, 255=(1/256) speed
SRAM_MODE:STRING=1

//32-bit event counter
SRAM_PERFCNT:STRING=0

//6-bit field selecting an event for event counter 0=default
SRAM_PERFCTRL:STRING=0

//No. of cycles addresses blocked (0-65535).
SRAM_PULSE_OFF:STRING=1

//No. of cycles addresses let through (0-65535).
SRAM_PULSE_ON:STRING=3999

//12-bit field. Minimum latency (clock cycles) from AVALID to RVALID.
SRAM_RLATENCY:STRING=32

//12-bit field. Minimum latency (clock cycles) from WVALID&WLAST
// to BVALID.
SRAM_WLATENCY:STRING=32

//SVDF
SVDF:BOOL=ON

//System core clock (Hz)
SYSTEM_CORE_CLOCK:STRING=25000000

//Target platform to build for: mps3, mps4, simple_platform and
// native.
TARGET_PLATFORM:STRING=mps3

//Specify platform target subsystem: sse-300 or sse-310
TARGET_SUBSYSTEM:STRING=sse-300

//Path to the timing adapter configuration file
TA_CONFIG_FILE:STRING=ta_config_u65_high_end

//Ethos-U NPU EXT timing adapter
TA_EXT_BASE:STRING=0x58103200

//Ethos-U NPU SRAM timing adapter
TA_SRAM_BASE:STRING=0x58103000

//TensorFlow Lite Mirco build type (release/debug etc.)
TENSORFLOW_LITE_MICRO_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=$<IF:$<CONFIG:RELEASE>,release_with_logs,debug>

//Select if clean target should be added to a list of targets.
TENSORFLOW_LITE_MICRO_CLEAN_BUILD:BOOL=ON

//Select if TPIP downloads should be cleaned before each build.
TENSORFLOW_LITE_MICRO_CLEAN_DOWNLOADS:BOOL=OFF

//Path to the root of the TensorFlow Lite Micro sources.
TENSORFLOW_SRC_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/dependencies/tensorflow

//Build TFLM for Arm Cortex-M
TFLM_BUILD_CORTEX_M_GENERIC:BOOL=TRUE

//Build type
TFLM_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=$<IF:$<CONFIG:RELEASE>,release_with_logs,debug>

//Optimization level
TFLM_OPTIMIZATION_LEVEL:STRING=-O3

//TFLM kernel implementation optimization type, can be speed or
// size
TFLM_OPTIMIZE_KERNELS_FOR:STRING=speed

//Transpose
TRANSPOSE:BOOL=ON

//UART base address
UART0_BASE:STRING=0x49303000

//UART baudrate
UART0_BAUDRATE:STRING=115200

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
USE_CASE_BUILD:UNINITIALIZED=yolov5s

//Select if a use case should execute using a default known input
// file.
USE_SINGLE_INPUT:BOOL=OFF

arm_math_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/b_yv5s/math

//Value Computed by CMake
ethos_u_npu_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake

//Activation buffer size for the chosen model
yolov5s_ACTIVATION_BUF_SZ:STRING=0x00200000

//Directory with custom input files, or path to a single input
// file, to use in the evaluation application.
yolov5s_FILE_PATH:PATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/resources/yolov5s/samples

//Square image size in pixels. Images will be resized to this size.
yolov5s_IMAGE_SIZE:STRING=640

//Labels' txt file for the chosen model
yolov5s_LABELS_TXT_FILE:FILEPATH=/home/linzejia/app/mlek_lee/resources/yolov5s/labels/labels_yolov5s.txt

// files must be in tflite format.

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################
